page: Microsoft Azure E192s_v7 is an Esv7-family virtual machine instance configured with 192 dedicated virtual CPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include integrated graphics processing units or bundled local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable for external block storage integration.

The high memory-to-vCPU ratio classifies this instance as a memory-optimized resource. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E192s_v7 provides a dense allocation of RAM and compute cores on a single virtual machine, reducing the need for multi-node clustering for large-scale in-memory workloads. Because it lacks local storage, users must provision external storage volumes to meet disk requirements. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large relational databases, in-memory analytics, and SAP HANA workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E192s_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Esv7 family, powered by an Intel x86_64 processor architecture. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers 192 dedicated vCPUs and 1536.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, but it supports Premium Storage for external disk configurations. This resource density makes the E192s_v7 highly suitable for large-scale enterprise workloads, including in-memory databases, data analytics, and memory-intensive business applications that require substantial RAM and compute capacity without local storage overhead.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E192s_v7 is an Esv7-family virtual machine featuring 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1536 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E192s_v7 is an Esv7 virtual machine with 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1536 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage support.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring one hundred and ninety-two dedicated cores and over one point five terabytes of system RAM.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated vCPUs utilizing x86_64 Intel processor architecture
1536.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external block storage
No bundled local storage or integrated graphics processing units
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise applications
